title: Here are some tips for writing a successful argument essay:
content:
Here are some tips for writing a successful argument essay:

Choose a clear, debatable topic. Ensure you can find enough evidence to support your position on the issue. Avoid topics that are too broad or too narrow; you want your readers to be able to focus on your argument without getting distracted by tangential issues.
Take a position and stick to it. Your goal is to persuade your reader that your point of view is valid, so make sure you present a strong and coherent argument throughout your essay.
Use evidence effectively. For your argument to be convincing, you must back it up with evidence from reliable sources. Include data, statistics, expert testimony, or real-life examples in your essay to support your claims.
Watch the video to learn about writing conclusions for persuasive essays!



After you finish this page, click Next to continue to Identify Your Audience.

Week 5 | Identify Your Audience

Identify Your Audience
The first step in writing a persuasive argument essay is identifying your audience. Who will be reading your essay? What are their beliefs and values? What are their preconceptions about your topic?
